channel.title: AI Morning Brief
channel.description: Your daily AI news briefing. Alex and Sara break down the latest updates on ChatGPT, Claude, image generation AI, and trending AI tools and services every morning.
channel.itunes:author: Believe

item.title: AI News - April 01, 2026
item.description: Today's topics: • Sexually explicit chatbot company is suing Apple after removal from the App Store - bizjournals.com • Assessing IREN’s (NasdaqGS:IREN) Valuation After Its Multi Year US$9.7b Microsoft AI Contract - simplywall.st • Fireside Chat: AI agents are reshaping mobile attacks — and exposing weak API trust models - Security Boulevard • Wikipedia’s AI agent row likely just the beginning of the bot-ocalypse - malwarebytes.com • Anthropic Leaks Claude Code, Community Recreates Agent - Let's Data Science • Nvidia Stock Just Did This for the First Time in 13 Years. History Shows What May Happen Next. - The Motley Fool • OpenAI’s shocking fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic - Los Angeles Times
item.itunes:summary: Today's topics: • Sexually explicit chatbot company is suing Apple after removal from the App Store - bizjournals.com • Assessing IREN’s (NasdaqGS:IREN) Valuation After Its Multi Year US$9.7b Microsoft AI Contract - simplywall.st • Fireside Chat: AI agents are reshaping mobile attacks — and exposing weak API trust models - Security Boulevard • Wikipedia’s AI agent row likely just the beginning of the bot-ocalypse - malwarebytes.com • Anthropic Leaks Claude Code, Community Recreates Agent - Let's Data Science • Nvidia Stock Just Did This for the First Time in 13 Years. History Shows What May Happen Next. - The Motley Fool • OpenAI’s shocking fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic - Los Angeles Times

item.title: AI News - March 31, 2026
item.description: Today's topics: • Anthropic accidentally exposes Claude Code source code in npm packaging error - siliconangle.com • Anthropic to sign deal with Australia on AI safety and economic data tracking - Reuters • VITAL BRIEFING—Anthropic sues Trump... - VitalLaw.com • Nvidia Just Invested $2 Billion in This Chip Stock. Here's What Investors Should Know - fool.com • Could This Be the Big Catalyst That Sends Apple's Stock Soaring in 2026? (Hint: It's Not Artificial Intelligence) - fool.com • Nvidia marks Marvell for AI-RAN, silicon photonics work ... with a $2B kicker - SDxCentral • ‘Guardian’ Apps Aim to Stop AI Agents From Going Rogue - The Information
item.itunes:summary: Today's topics: • Anthropic accidentally exposes Claude Code source code in npm packaging error - siliconangle.com • Anthropic to sign deal with Australia on AI safety and economic data tracking - Reuters • VITAL BRIEFING—Anthropic sues Trump... - VitalLaw.com • Nvidia Just Invested $2 Billion in This Chip Stock. item.title: AI News - March 30, 2026
item.description: Today's topics: • Philadelphia Courts implement ban on smart/META AI eyeglasses - 6abc Philadelphia • Ford (F) Advances with Google's AI-Powered EV Charging Integrati - GuruFocus • Sora Was Reportedly Costing OpenAI $1 Million Per Day - 80 Level • Evolving expectations of what’s possible - blog.google • Reddit privacy case against Anthropic kicked back to state court - courthousenews.com • Microsoft AI Releases Harrier-OSS-v1: A New Family of Multilingual Embedding Models Hitting SOTA on Multilingual MTEB v2 - MarkTechPost • Stock Market Today, March 30: Microsoft Rises on Copilot Expansion and New AI Product Launches - The Motley Fool
item.itunes:summary: Today's topics: • Philadelphia Courts implement ban on smart/META AI eyeglasses - 6abc Philadelphia • Ford (F) Advances with Google's AI-Powered EV Charging Integrati - GuruFocus • Sora Was Reportedly Costing OpenAI $1 Million Per Day - 80 Level • Evolving expectations of what’s possible - blog.google • Reddit privacy case against Anthropic kicked back to state court - courthousenews.com • Microsoft AI Releases Harrier-OSS-v1: A New Family of Multilingual Embedding Models Hitting SOTA on Multilingual MTEB v2 - MarkTechPost • Stock Market Today, March 30: Microsoft Rises on Copilot Expansion and New AI Product Launches - The Motley Fool

item.title: AI News - March 30, 2026
item.description: Today's topics: • Apple Pivots Its AI Strategy to App Store, Search-Like Platform Approach - Bloomberg.com • Is Now a Good Time to Buy Microsoft Stock? - The Globe and Mail • Apple to Open Siri to Rival AI Assistants - channelnews.com.au • Handshake and OpenAI launch Codex Creator Challenge to expand student AI skills - EdTech Innovation Hub • How to Build Advanced Cybersecurity AI Agents with CAI Using Tools, Guardrails, Handoffs, and Multi-Agent Workflows - MarkTechPost • AAPL Stock Today, March 30: Apple Bets AI on App Store and Hardware - Meyka • NVIDIA (NVDA) Backed Start-up Reflection AI To Raise $2.5 Billion - finance.yahoo.com
item.itunes:summary: Today's topics: • Apple Pivots Its AI Strategy to App Store, Search-Like Platform Approach - Bloomberg.com • Is Now a Good Time to Buy Microsoft Stock? - The Globe and Mail • Apple to Open Siri to Rival AI Assistants - channelnews.com.au • Handshake and OpenAI launch Codex Creator Challenge to expand student AI skills - EdTech Innovation Hub • How to Build Advanced Cybersecurity AI Agents with CAI Using Tools, Guardrails, Handoffs, and Multi-Agent Workflows - MarkTechPost • AAPL Stock Today, March 30: Apple Bets AI on App Store and Hardware - Meyka • NVIDIA (NVDA) Backed Start-up Reflection AI To Raise $2.5 Billion - finance.yahoo.com

item.title: AI News - March 27, 2026
item.description: Today's topics: • Anthropic vs. the Pentagon: A judge offers the clearest breakdown yet • Intelligence may be scalable, but accountability is not: Hidden cost of the AI agent revolution • CoverGo AI Agent Enhances Generali Health Claims Automation • How Microsoft champions frontier firms for faster, smarter growth • Meta Platforms Slips as Legal Verdict and AI Spending Concerns Converge • Apple stock holds steady as AirPods Max 2 launch and AI strategy updates roll out
item.itunes:summary: Today's topics: • Anthropic vs. the Pentagon: A judge offers the clearest breakdown yet • Intelligence may be scalable, but accountability is not: Hidden cost of the AI agent revolution • CoverGo AI Agent Enhances Generali Health Claims Automation • How Microsoft champions frontier firms for faster, smarter growth • Meta Platforms Slips as Legal Verdict and AI Spending Concerns Converge • Apple stock holds steady as AirPods Max 2 launch and AI strategy updates roll out
